name: Shai Ben-David
research_snippet: machine learning theory, logic, the theory of distributed computation and complexity theory
profile_summary: Shai Ben-David is a professor at the University of Waterloo, with a background in physics, mathematics, and psychology, and a PhD in set theory. His research interests include machine learning, logic, and the theory of distributed computation and complexity theory. He aims to provide mathematical formulation and understanding of real world problems.

name: Maura Grossman
profile_summary: Maura R. Grossman is a Research Professor in the David R. Cheriton School of Computer Science at the University of Waterloo, with a focus on trustworthy evaluation and use of artificial intelligence in law and healthcare.
